cipher_tube.leadershipNarrative: Cipher‑tube is a modular, capability‑driven platform engineered with a Director‑level hybrid mindset.

pitchSlide.sentinel: Security layer: IDOR, DoS, validation, sanitization, rate limiting
pitchSlide.bolt: Performance layer: caching, pre-warming, session lifecycle, health tuning
pitchSlide.palette: UX layer: accessibility, UI consistency, user-centered design

cipher_tube.recruiterDescription: Cipher‑tube is a modular platform built around security (Sentinel), performance (Bolt), and UX (Palette).
